SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF TERENCE GOH AND DEFENDANT TODD RAVENCROFT. PAUL ZENAK, A WITNESS FOR DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH BUT DID NOT TESTIFY. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. THE COURT RETAINED BOTH PLAINTIFF'S & DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOH, TERENCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAVENCROFT, TODD STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
